entities.context: Persona to route to when stuck on mechanics

entities.context: Principle about not claiming done early - referenced as critical violation

entities.context: Safety principle for testing before execution

entities.name: Language Selection
entities.context: Decision framework for choosing implementation language

entities.name: Python
entities.context: Default language choice - best LLM corpus, general purpose

entities.name: Shell
entities.context: Language for Unix-heavy glue work, 80%+ Unix tools threshold

entities.name: Node.js
entities.context: Language for API-heavy work with first-class web APIs

entities.name: Go
entities.context: Language for performance daemons, worse ergonomics

entities.name: SQLite
entities.context: Database for single-user, local, portable use cases

entities.name: PostgreSQL
entities.context: Database for multi-user network scenarios, used rarely

relationships.context: Routes unclear design work to Architect
Critical principle - never claim done early
Default language for complex logic and prototyping
Python is default in decision tree
Node chosen for web API work
